name: Brie Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened butter and room-temperature brie in a food processor until creamy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, cayenne pepper, salt) and blend until dough forms almost into a ball in the food processor.
3. Shape the dough into a 2-inch round roll and wrap tightly in plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate overnight to allow the dough to set.
5. Slice the chilled dough rolls into 1/4 inch thick pieces.
6. Place the slices, about 2 inches apart on a baking sheet.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes or until the edges are browned.
8. Cool on a rack.
9. Sprinkle with paprika and serve immediately.
